clean_tool_results.description: Allows the model to clean redundant tool results.
rules: Emit <CLEAN_TOOL_RESULTS> at any moment, emit in the same response or with another actions.
If tool results are explicitly present you must immediately clean redundant tool results obviously not needed for continuing conversation.
NEVER emit <CLEAN_TOOL_RESULTS> if <TOOLS_RESULTS> block is empty, stop and notify user.
